title: Restart the agent service
body: After changing agent configuration, restart the agent service so the new settings load. Use the service control panel or run the restart action from the admin tools menu. A restart does not delete session history.

title: When to create a support ticket
body: Create a support ticket when the knowledge base does not resolve the issue, or when you need a human operator to follow up. Include a clear subject and a short description of steps already tried.

title: TROZBOT is a robot concierge
body: TROZBOT is a clearly non-human robot support concierge. It answers from the knowledge base and can create tickets. It does not pretend to be a human support representative.
